executives.name: Paul Harbidge
executives.background: Mr. Harbidge has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously President and CEO of GT Gold Corp. and Senior Vice President, Exploration at Goldcorp Inc. He also served as General Manager, Exploration at Randgold Resources.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: Graham Richardson
executives.background: Mr. Richardson is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in finance and accounting. He was previously CFO of Nova Royalty Corp. and has held senior roles at Teck Resources and KPMG.

executives.name: Zachary Flood
executives.background: Mr. Flood is a professional geologist with over 15 years of experience in mineral exploration. He is a co-founder of Kenorland Minerals Ltd. and has worked with Ivanhoe Mines and Rio Tinto.

executives.name: Angela Johnson
executives.background: Ms. Johnson is a professional geologist with over 12 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously VP Corporate Development at Silvercorp Metals and has held roles at SSR Mining and Calibre Mining.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Corporate Development and Sustainability

executives.name: Stacey Pavlova
executives.background: Ms. Pavlova is a finance professional with over 10 years of experience in investor relations and corporate communications. She was previously VP Investor Relations at New Pacific Metals and has held roles at SSR Mining.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Investor Relations and Communications

board_of_directors.name: Russell Ball
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ball has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously CFO and EVP of Corporate Development at Newmont Mining and CFO of Goldcorp Inc. He currently serves on the boards of several public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Harbidge
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Harbidge has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously President and CEO of GT Gold Corp. and Senior Vice President, Exploration at Goldcorp Inc.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: Zachary Flood
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Flood is a professional geologist and co-founder of Kenorland Minerals Ltd. He has extensive experience in mineral exploration and corporate development.

board_of_directors.name: Alan Lenczner
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lenczner is a founding partner of Lenczner Slaght Royce Smith Griffin LLP and is recognized as one of Canada's leading litigators. He has served as a Commissioner of the Ontario Securities Commission.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: Katherine Arnold
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Arnold is a professional engineer with over 35 years of experience in environmental engineering and permitting. She was previously Director of Environmental and Regulatory Affairs at Hudbay Minerals.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: Audra Walsh
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Walsh is a professional engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously CEO of Minas de Aguas Teñidas (MATSA) and has held senior roles at Newmont and Barrick Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Bob Long
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Long has over 40 years of experience in the mining and finance industries. He was previously CEO of Lydian International and has held senior roles at the International Finance Corporation (IFC).

sources.source_description: Faraday Copper Corp. Official Website - Management and Board Page
